tasks.instruction: Read the text below. Fill in each gap (1.1-1.6) with one word to make the text correct.
tasks.text: Last summer, my class visited a museum. The building 1.1. _________ built over 200 years ago, and it is still visited by thousands of people every year. Our guide told us that the oldest painting in the museum 1.2. _________ painted by a famous artist in 1750. I thought it was amazing! If I 1.3. _________ a painter, I would create pictures of dragons and magical forests. My friend Tom said he 1.4. _________ like to be a sculptor instead. Right now, new rooms 1.5. _________ being added to the museum, so next year there will be even more art to see. We 1.6. _________ go back soon — our teacher has already promised us another trip!
